title: Integrative Therapy based on Yoga, Ayurveda and Modern Western Medicine for Treatment of High-risk Cases of COVID-19: A Telemedicine-Based Case Series
description: This research explores the effectiveness of an integrative treatment model combining Yoga, Ayurveda, and modern Western medicine for managing high-risk COVID-19 patients through telemedicine. The study highlights improvements in patient recovery and demonstrates the potential of integrative healthcare approaches.
author: Bentur S.A., Mishra A., Kumar Y., Thakral S., Garg R.

title: Exploring the Science of Marma – An Ancient Healing Technique: Definition and Properties of Marma
description: The study explains the definition, characteristics, and therapeutic importance of Marma points in Ayurveda, providing a scientific perspective on this traditional healing system.
